G

GenericLinkedList<T> - Class in Unnamed Package
A doubly linked list implementation specialized for hash table separate chaining.
GenericLinkedList() - Constructor for class GenericLinkedList
 
getActualLoadFactor() - Method in class HashTable
Calculates the current load factor based on unique entries and table capacity.
getAllWords() - Method in class DictionaryBuilder
Returns an alphabetical list of all unique words
getBuckets() - Method in class HashTable
Provides access to the underlying bucket array for iteration purposes.
getCapacity() - Method in class HashTable
Returns the current physical capacity of the hash table's array.
getFrequency(String) - Method in class DictionaryBuilder
Retrieves the frequency of a word in the dictionary.
getFrequency(T) - Method in class GenericLinkedList
Retrieves the number of times a specific element has been added to the list.
getFrequency(T) - Method in class HashTable
Returns the number of times a specific word has been inserted into the table.
getSize() - Method in class GenericLinkedList
Returns the total number of unique nodes currently in the list.
getTable() - Method in class DictionaryBuilder
Provides access to the underlying HashTable.
getTotalWords() - Method in class DictionaryBuilder
Returns the total number of words inserted, including duplicates.
getUniqueCount() - Method in class HashTable
Returns the total number of unique elements currently stored in the table.
GUIDriver - Class in Unnamed Package
Project 4 Swing Application (GUI) Mirrors the CLI driver (add / remove|delete / search / list / quit).
